title: 3996 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Year
|image=[[File:TotJTSW6-Textless-EC.png]]
|conflict=[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

|events=*End of [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]<ref name="NEC" />

The following events took place in '''3996 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] is destroyed.<ref name="NEC" />
*The [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] ends.<ref name="NEC" />
*[[Cron Supernova/Legends|Cron Supernova]].
*[[Urkupp]] is destroyed.
*[[Gorman Vandrayk]] leaves [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]].
*[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] becomes [[Sever Force/Legends|stripped]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
*The [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] becomes trapped on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
*[[Susejo]] and an [[Unidentified female Jedi (sarlacc)|another Jedi]], who are the only known victims of a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] to be completely digested, fall into the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]].
*[[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka]] begins to mine on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] from the outpost city of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]].

==Battles==
*[[Devastation of Mustafar/Legends|Battle of Mustafar]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*[[Dark Reaper campaign]]
*[[Duel on Kuar]]<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
*[[Battle of Foerost (Great Sith War)|Battle of Foerost]]
*[[Battle of Coruscant (Great Sith War)|Battle of Coruscant]]
*[[Duel in the Senate]]
*[[Battle of Kemplex Nine]]
*[[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|Battle of Ossus]]
*[[Battle of the Al'Har system|Battle of Al'Har]]
*[[Battle of Gyndine (Great Sith War)|Battle of Gyndine]]
*[[Battle of the Denon system|Battle of Denon]]
*[[Battle of Onderon (Great Sith War)|Battle of Onderon]]
*[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|Battle of Yavin 4]]
*[[Recapture of the Empress Teta system]]
*[[Battle of Toprawa (Great Sith War)|Battle of Toprawa]]
*[[Ambush in the Ansharii Caverns]]

==Deaths==
*[[Gar Anstak]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]
*[[Dominus]]
*[[Zona Luka]]
*[[Varda]]
*[[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]<ref name="tsw1">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]]</ref>
*Most of the [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] population

*In the Second Battle of Coruscant
**[[Vodo-Siosk Baas]]
**[[Sidrona]]

*In the Ambush in the [[Ansharii Caverns/Legends|Ansharii Caverns]]:
**[[Barrison Draay]]
**[[Dossa]]
**Doctor [[Uburluh]]

*In the Battle of Kemplex IX:
**[[Crado]]
**[[Shoaneb Culu]]
**[[Dace Diath]]
**[[Aleema Keto]]
**[[Qrrrl Toq]]

*[[Cay Qel-Droma]] in the Battle of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]
*[[Mandalore the Indomitable]] in the Battle of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]

*In the Battle of Yavin 4:
**[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] (mortal death)<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
**[[Nayama]]
